assertive.label: Dead Certain
assertive.description: At least 75% of your answers were either "Strongly Agree" or "Strongly Disagree".

equilibriste.label: Tightrope Walker
equilibriste.description: You stayed moderate in at least 75% of your answers.

mondialiste.label: Citizen of the World
mondialiste.description: You're ultra-internationalist (≥ 75% left on the 'Scale of Sovereignty' axis).

technosceptique.label: Informed Skeptic
technosceptique.description: You're wary of new technology (≥ 75% on the techno-skeptic side).

techno_prophete.label: Techno-Prophet
techno_prophete.description: You deeply believe technical progress can solve humanity's biggest problems.

authoritaire.label: Authoritarian
authoritaire.description: You believe a strong society requires firm authority.

inclassable.label: Unclassifiable
inclassable.description: You're hard to pin down: no axis dominates above 65%.

communiste.label: Communist
communiste.description: You combine strong anti-capitalism, a clear preference for state intervention, and a collectivist view of property.

anarchiste_poetique.label: Poetic Anarchist
anarchiste_poetique.description: You want a world without bosses — but also a gentler, fairer one.

liberal.label: Unapologetic Free-Marketeer
liberal.description: You trust the market more than the state.

reformiste_tranquille.label: Quiet Reformist
reformiste_tranquille.description: You reject upheaval, but want to improve things step by step.

spiritualiste.label: Modern Spiritualist
spiritualiste.description: You believe faith can still guide society.

decisif.label: Decisive
decisif.description: You never answered neutrally: every question tipped you one way or the other.

protecteur.label: Protector
protecteur.description: You clearly prioritize security over individual freedoms.

libre_par_principe.label: Free on Principle
libre_par_principe.description: You reject authority, imposed rules, and repression, in the name of fundamental freedom.

collectiviste_social.label: Social Collectivist
collectiviste_social.description: You favor solidarity, redistribution, and economic equality.

souverainiste.label: Sovereigntist
souverainiste.description: You're committed to national independence and popular sovereignty.

productiviste_vert.label: Green Productivist
productiviste_vert.description: You combine faith in growth with ecological awareness.

social_liberal.label: Social Liberal
social_liberal.description: You seem to balance social protection with a market economy.

etat_stratege.label: State Strategist
etat_stratege.description: You want a strong state that steers the economy and plans for the future.

egalitariste.label: Egalitarian
egalitariste.description: You place a high value on equality — economic, social, or political.

conservateur_culturel.label: Conservative
conservateur_culturel.description: You want to preserve tradition and moral order.

hesitant.label: Fence-Sitter
hesitant.description: You answered "Neither Agree nor Disagree" on at least 8 questions.

decentralisateur.label: Direct Democrat
decentralisateur.description: You want citizens to decide more directly, instead of delegating everything to elected officials. (Democracy ≥ 75% on the participatory side)

progressiste_moral.label: Moral Progressive
progressiste_moral.description: You challenge traditional norms around morals, family, or religion.

dissident_tranquille.label: Quiet Dissident
dissident_tranquille.description: You reject the established order, without provocation or radicalism.

constructiviste.label: Constructivist
constructiviste.description: You believe social, economic, and political rules are made to be rethought.

anarchiste.label: Anarchist
anarchiste.description: You want to abolish bosses, top-down orders, and all vertical domination. (Anarchism ≥ 85%)

pro_europeen.label: Committed European
pro_europeen.description: You see the European Union as a legitimate political project with a future worth building.

pro_lgbt.label: Ally
pro_lgbt.description: You unambiguously defend the rights and freedoms of LGBTQ+ people.

eugeniste_pragmatique.label: Genomic Medicine
eugeniste_pragmatique.description: You consider genetic selection legitimate when it spares a child a serious illness.

legaliseur.label: Pro-Legalization
legaliseur.description: You support drug legalization in the name of individual freedom and common sense.

cosmonaute.label: Committed Cosmonaut
cosmonaute.description: You see space as an opportunity, a necessity, or a horizon for humanity.

rationaliste_pur.label: Pure Rationalist
rationaliste_pur.description: You believe scientific reason alone should guide collective decisions.

anti_censure_absolue.label: Absolute Anti-Censorship
anti_censure_absolue.description: For you, free speech includes the right to shock.

chasseur_de_fakes.label: Fake News Hunter
chasseur_de_fakes.description: Curbing disinformation is, for you, a necessity.

oeil_de_camera.label: Camera Eye
oeil_de_camera.description: You trust video surveillance to prevent crime.

hors_champ.label: Off-Camera
hors_champ.description: You reject a permanent state of emergency and a society under constant surveillance.

restrictionniste.label: Restrictionist
restrictionniste.description: You want to tighten immigration policy and prioritize aid for citizens first.

referendumiste.label: Referendum Advocate
referendumiste.description: You want major laws put to a direct popular vote.

elitiste.label: Trusts the Experts
elitiste.description: You'd rather major decisions be made by representatives surrounded by experts than by direct vote.

action_directe.label: Direct Action
action_directe.description: For you, radical breaks and mobilization can be necessary.

anticarceral.label: Anti-Incarceration
anticarceral.description: You favor repair and alternatives to prison.

euro_sceptique.label: Euroskeptic
euro_sceptique.description: You strongly doubt the EU's political project.

bastion_du_proprietaire.label: Guardian of Property
bastion_du_proprietaire.description: You see private property as an essential safeguard of freedom. (Property ≥ 75%)

capitaine_dindustrie.label: Wealth Builder
capitaine_dindustrie.description: You trust investors and entrepreneurs to drive the economy forward. (Economic purpose ≥ 75% right)

voix_du_parlement.label: Faith in Parliament
voix_du_parlement.description: You believe electing representatives to decide on everyone's behalf is the best guarantee of an effective democracy. (Democracy ≥ 75% on the parliamentary side)

sentinelle_de_lordre.label: Sentinel of Order
sentinelle_de_lordre.description: Punishment should protect and deter above all else. (Justice ≥ 75% on the punitive side)

artisan_du_travail.label: Dignity Through Effort
artisan_du_travail.description: You see work as a central value, giving each person meaning, recognition, and dignity. (Work ≥ 75% on the workist side)

promethee_productiviste.label: Apostle of Abundance
promethee_productiviste.description: For you, producing and growing are the best ways to meet ecological challenges, without sacrificing comfort or human momentum. (Ecology ≥ 75% on the productivist side)

porte_flambeau_revolution.label: Torchbearer of Revolution
porte_flambeau_revolution.description: You carry the banner of radical change high, ready to overturn the established order to build a new horizon. (Social change ≥ 75% on the revolution side)

gardien_de_la_laicite.label: Guardian of Secularism
gardien_de_la_laicite.description: You defend a strict separation between religion and public life, to guarantee equality for all, believers and non-believers alike. (Religion ≥ 75% on the secularist side)

proprietaire_de_ses_jours.label: Owner of Your Own Time
proprietaire_de_ses_jours.description: Every day is yours, shaped by your own wishes and your own pace, far from imposed schedules.
